situation: audit-2026-07-08-045 finding PA-B2-M-002: _cn_to_int returns 0 for any unrecognized input (e.g. '百', '千', 'abc', empty string). This silently corrupts date/time parsing — callers treat 0 as valid, producing wrong dates or hours instead of gracefully returning None.
action: Changed _cn_to_int to return None for malformed input. Updated all 5 call sites in temporal.py (_parse_hm ×3, resolve absolute-date ×1, resolve X天前/后 ×1, resolve_range 最近N天 ×1) to propagate None → return None. Added test_malformed_returns_none with 6 cases. All 48 tests pass.
